Contracting Authority: DAK-Gesundheit, Nagelsweg 27-31, 20097 Hamburg; KГ¶rperschaft des Г¶ffentlichen Rechts
Project Description: Framework agreements per lot (7 lots) for consulting and support services in IT-management. Topics include CIO advisory, IT architecture governance, IT-organization/DevOps, cyber-resilience & IT security, IT-project/portfolio/program management & PMO, data strategy (data-driven transformation), and administrative efficiency (process optimization, make-or-buy, economic evaluations).
Important Dates:
- Notice dispatched: 31.07.2024
- Questions deadline (TTW): 21.08.2024, 12:00
- Participation deadline (TTW): 02.09.2024, 12:00
- Invitation to submit first offers (planned): 23.09.2024
- Negotiations (1st round, Lots 6вҖ“7): 11.11.вҖ“19.11.2024
- Planned award: 13.12.2024

Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: Remote by default; onsite if required for data protection. Onsite location: DAK-Gesundheit HQ, Nagelsweg 27-31, 20097 Hamburg.
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications: Regulatory: SGB V, SGB X, DSGVO, VAG, VAIT, NIS-2. Methods/standards: ITIL v3/v4, ISO/IEC 20000, COBIT, TOGAF/Zachman, PMI/PRINCE2/IPMA, Scrum/SAFe/LeSS, BSI IT-Grundschutz, ISMS (ISO 27001). Security certs: CISA, CISSP, CRISC, CISM, ISO27001 LA.
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia: Consortia allowed; joint and several liability; representative required. Subcontracting allowed; Eignungsleihe requires naming (B3) and evidence; subs incl. sub-subs must meet same requirements; compliance with minimum wage, confidentiality, data protection.
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission: Electronic submission via Deutsches Vergabeportal (dtvp.de) Bietertool; text form (В§126b BGB) or e-sign options; use provided templates; communication and Q&A only via portal.

Offer Submission Documents: Anlage B5_Skillprofil (CV + 3 personal references per person/skill)
Company reference sheets per lot (per A1 criteria)
SAP Signavio partnership proof (Lot 7) incl. certificate (copy)
List of Documents: Credit rating: at least medium (Creditreform index as of 31.12.2023 or later)
Revenue structure: вүҘ51% IT consulting (last 3 FY); EU вүҘ50%; DE вүҘ25% (of EU); Finance/Insurance вүҘ25% (of EU)
Company references within вүӨ5 calendar years (per lot volume & sector quotas)
Headcount/experience averages per lot (see staffing minima)
SAP Signavio projects under partnership in DE (Lot 7)

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: No fixed EUR minimum stated; require revenue mix: вүҘ51% IT consulting over last 3 FY; EU вүҘ50%; DE вүҘ25% (of EU); Finance/Insurance вүҘ25% (of EU).
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Evidence via company references and revenue share in IT consulting as above.

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Provide company identification (e.g., Handelsregister number and court, USt-ID/W-IdNr.).
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB В§В§123/124 or eq: Mandatory reliability self-declaration; excludes entities with listed convictions/tax/SS non-payment unless remedied.
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name subs; submit B3; if relying on capacity, sub must perform that part; joint liability for financial capacity.

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Lot 1: Management Consultant; Senior Consultant IT Strategy; Senior Enterprise Architect. Skills: C-level stakeholder mgmt; EA (TOGAF/Zachman); PM certs (PMI/PRINCE2/IPMA); ITIL/COBIT; Security (CISSP); German/English вүҘC2; 10+ yrs (Mgmt Consultant), 8+ yrs (Senior IT Strategy), 8+ yrs (Senior EA), public/KV experience.
- Lot 2: Senior IT Architect; Senior Consultant IT-Sourcing. Skills: 54+ months recent project exp; EA/TOGAF; IREB/ISTQB; cloud (Azure/GCP/AWS); ITIL v3+; PRINCE2/Scrum; German C2.
- Lot 3: DevOps Expert; Senior Consultant Agility & Value Stream. Skills: 7+ yrs DevOps (5 yrs lead); CI/CD, IaC, cloud/serverless; Azure; Agile certs (Scrum/SAFe/LeSS/PRINCE2 Agile); German C2.
- Lot 4: IT-Security Expert; Privacy Expert. Skills: 5+ yrs in regulated markets; CISA/CISSP/CRISC/CISM/ISO27001 LA; ISMS; BSI 200-1/2/3; ITSM (ITIL3+); cloud security; Privacy: CDPSE; cloud privacy; German C2.
- Lot 5: Senior IT Portfolio/Project/Program Manager; Senior PMO Consultant. Skills: PMI/PRINCE2/IPMA + Agile (Scrum/SAFe/LeSS/PRINCE2 Agile); German C2; Jira/PM tools; coaching; months thresholds: PM/Portf/PMO вүҘ30 months (last 3 yrs), Program вүҘ40 months (last 4 yrs).
- Lot 6: Strategic Mgmt Consultant (Data Strategy); Senior Data Governance; Senior Data Management; Senior Tech & Architecture (Data); Senior Organization & MoC. Skills: data strategy, governance (COBIT/ITIL), data quality/management, architecture/tech stacks, IoT data, KI/ML/PM; C-level advisory; German/English вүҘC2; proven coaching.
- Lot 7: Senior Economic Analysis; Senior Process Management; Solution Architect (SAP & Microsoft Power Platform). Skills: business cases (NPV/ROI), SAP Signavio modeling (BPMN), SAP S/4HANA, MS Power Platform; PM certs; C-level stakeholder mgmt; German/English вүҘC2.
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Lot 1: вүҘ20 staff (EU-based) in CIO-Advisory; avg tenure вүҘ3.5 yrs; avg experience вүҘ7 yrs.
- Lot 2: вүҘ15 staff in IT-strategy/regulatory; avg tenure вүҘ3.5 yrs; avg experience вүҘ5 yrs.
- Lot 3: вүҘ15 staff in IT-strategy/regulatory; avg tenure вүҘ3.5 yrs; avg experience вүҘ5 yrs.
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects: Key-personnel: each person must submit 3 personal references (вүӨ5 years) per offered skill (Anlage B5).

Company Referrals: Per lot company references (вүӨ5 calendar years, comparable scope): Lot 1: вүҘ5 (incl. вүҘ2 in EU finance/insurance; вүҘ1 DE client under Berufsgeheimnis). Lot 2: вүҘ5 (same quotas). Lot 3: вүҘ5 (same). Lot 4: вүҘ5 (incl. NIST framework, legal/regulatory adherence; same quotas). Lot 5: вүҘ10 (EU finance вүҘ4; DE Berufsgeheimnis вүҘ2; in-time/budget/quality). Lot 6: вүҘ5 (data-driven transformation; CIO-Advisory; board engagement; вүҘ2 in EU). Lot 7: вүҘ5 (same quotas as lots 1вҖ“3).
Award Criteria:
- Award: most economically advantageous tender (В§58 VgV); details via Bewertungsmatrix at offer stage; negotiations for Lots 6вҖ“7 (presentations).
- Eignungs-/selection scoring (per lot, examples):
  вҖў Duration per reference: Lot 1/2/3: >2y=8; 1.5вҖ“<2y=4; 1вҖ“<1.5y=2; <1y=0. Lot 4/5/7: >4y=8; 3вҖ“<4y=4; 2вҖ“<3y=2; 1вҖ“<2y=1; <1y=0. Lot 6: >3y=8; 2вҖ“<3y=4; 1вҖ“<2y=2; <1y=0.
  вҖў Implementation involvement per reference (all lots): to initial completion with (partial) result responsibility=10; without=6; partial scope with=6; partial without=2; none=0.
  вҖў Project revenue per reference (examples): Lot 1/3: >вӮ¬2mвҖ“вӮ¬4m=8; вӮ¬1.5mвҖ“<вӮ¬2m=6; вӮ¬1mвҖ“<вӮ¬1.5m=4; вӮ¬0.5mвҖ“<вӮ¬1m=2; >вӮ¬4.5mвҖ“вӮ¬5m=4; >вӮ¬5mвҖ“вӮ¬5.5m=2; else 0. Lot 2/6: >вӮ¬6mвҖ“вӮ¬8m=8; вӮ¬5mвҖ“<вӮ¬6m=6; вӮ¬4mвҖ“<вӮ¬5m=4; вӮ¬3mвҖ“<вӮ¬4m=2; >вӮ¬8mвҖ“вӮ¬11m=6/2; <вӮ¬3m or >вӮ¬11m=0. Lot 5: >вӮ¬3mвҖ“вӮ¬5m=8; вӮ¬2mвҖ“<вӮ¬3m=6; вӮ¬1mвҖ“<вӮ¬2m=4; вӮ¬0.5mвҖ“<вӮ¬1m=2; >вӮ¬5mвҖ“вӮ¬7.5m=6/2; else 0. Lot 7: >вӮ¬5mвҖ“вӮ¬7m=8; вӮ¬4mвҖ“<вӮ¬5m=6; вӮ¬3mвҖ“<вӮ¬4m=4; вӮ¬2mвҖ“<вӮ¬3m=2; >вӮ¬7mвҖ“вӮ¬10m=6/2; else 0.
  вҖў Years in business (all lots): >20y=10; 15вҖ“<20y=6; 10вҖ“<15y=4; 5вҖ“<10y=2; <5y=1.
